case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. ALEJANDRINA PHELAN

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 72292514) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-22-2024 CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHELAN, ALEJANDRINA $6,250.53 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,250.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74634391)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-22-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 74634391) AS TO DEFENDANT PHELAN, ALEJANDRINA
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 72292514) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
DECLARATION RE NON-ACTIVE MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 74634391) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-14-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 72292514) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PHELAN, ALEJANDRINA NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-03-2024

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74634391), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. SERVED AUG-01-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-02-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT PHELAN, ALEJANDRINA
